I saw this photo and I simply fell in love, I thought it was really cute 😭

About my bots:

• Initial messages are often long.

• I create bots from existing characters and my own oc's.

• I accept ideas and requests in the comments.

• I make all types of content: WLW, MLM, AnyPov, Dead Dove, Fluff, Angst...

• I don't write in the opening messages about the main characters doing things like abuse or . I can create motherfucking characters, but at that level I don't feel comfortable. If the character practices this during the conversation, I have no control.

Hope you like it! ♡
